seoTitle: Dumbarton vs Dumberning — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dumbarton and Dumberning. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dumbarton and Dumberning.
heading: Dumbarton vs Dumberning — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dumbarton, Western Australia and Dumberning, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dumbarton has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Dumberning (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dumbarton or Dumberning safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dumbarton has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Dumberning scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dumbarton scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Dumberning scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dumbarton or Dumberning?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dumbarton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
